reaper.description: Show REAPER MCP server status and available tools
reaper.template: Check the status of the REAPER MCP server. List the available reaper_* tools and confirm whether the server is connected to a running REAPER instance. If it is not connected, explain how to enable REAPER's distant API (Actions > Run ReaScript > `import reapy; reapy.config.enable_dist_api()`) and restart REAPER.
